title: What is Larkup?
content: Larkup is an open-source toolkit for launching production-ready RAG servers. It handles ingestion, indexing, and retrieval so you can focus on building AI applications.

title: Vector Store Options
content: Larkup supports multiple vector stores including LanceDB (local, zero-config), Pinecone (cloud-hosted), and Chroma (self-hosted or cloud). Each store can be configured through the Web UI or CLI.

title: Embedding Models
content: The platform supports embedding models from OpenAI, Cohere, Google, Anthropic, and custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Models can be selected and configured through the Configuration page.

title: CLI Usage
content: The CLI (@larkup/cli) provides commands: init, config, add-doc, index, serve, query, chat, generate, and settings. Install globally with npm install -g @larkup/cli.

title: Deployment Options
content: Larkup supports local development with pnpm dev, Docker deployment with docker compose, and cloud deployment to Vercel or custom VPS servers.
